description: Style Note Wear this kurta to work or for traditional family functions. With variety and style on their side, span kurtas fulfil the ethnic requirements of your wardrobe. Colourful with a contemporary edge, you can wear these kurtas with contrasting leggings or churidars and ethnic sandals for an easy traditional look.Product Details Red kurta, has a scooped neckline at the back and front with a tie up at the back, green panelling at the hemline, side slits, embroidered panel around the neckline in the front and solid green panelling around the neckline at the back and sleevelessMaterial and Care 100% cotton Dry clean onlySize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
